world.description: Ethiopian authorities have arrested a "dangerous international human trafficker" alongside nine of his accomplices. science.title: Gravity Modulates Quantum Fluctuations, New Equations Confirm
science.description: Can gravity fundamentally limit how precisely we know both the density and momentum of a quantum field at a given point in spacetime. New calculations demonstrate that spacetime curvature directly modulates these quantum uncertainties, establishing first-principles constraints for models of dark matter and a theory of stochastic quantum gravity. This work builds upon the Madelung transformation, generalized to account for arbitrary spacetime geometries and improving upon previous uncertainty relation derivations.
